prompt: We need to add a new NFS: 'All sensitive data at rest and in transit must be encrypted using AES-256.' This is critical for data privacy. Could you also clarify the scope of URS-011, 'Audit Trail for Administrator Actions'?

expected.addRequirement: add a new NFS: 'All sensitive data at rest and in transit must be encrypted using AES-256.'
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Critical for the new NFS.
expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify the scope of URS-011, 'Audit Trail for Administrator Actions'.
